summary: Iteration 42 - Comprehensive testing of ASR Enterprises solar website with CRM, HR portal updates. Tested: Admin/Staff login pages with OTP tabs, WhatsApp link (wa.me/919296389097), phone number (8877896889), Book Solar Service modal, Shop removal, Contact page, and OTP verification bug fix.

issues: Route shows blank page instead of 404 or redirect - Shop was removed but route not fully cleaned up

action_items: MINOR: Add /api/health endpoint or update tests to use correct health endpoint
MINOR: Consider removing /shop route entirely from React Router or add redirect to homepage
critical_code_review_comments: OTP verification bug fix confirmed working - no longer auto-verifies with undefined response
Dual phone configuration verified: Call=8877896889, WhatsApp=919296389097
Book Solar Service modal correctly shows ₹2,499 default price from API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features verified working: Admin login (Password + Mobile OTP tabs), Staff login (Password + Email OTP + Mobile OTP tabs), WhatsApp links (919296389097), Phone links (8877896889), Book Solar Service modal with QR payment, Contact page. OTP verification properly shows error for invalid OTP (bug fix confirmed). Shop removed from navigation but /shop route shows blank page.
